description: This file defines a React Native screen component for user sign-up, including UI elements such as input fields, buttons, and styling, and handles registration logic with an authentication context.

methods.name: SignUpScreen
methods.description: React component rendering a sign-up form with input fields for name, email, and password, and handling submission using the auth context.

methods.name: onSubmit
methods.description: Event handler for sign-up button, performs user registration and error handling.
